qa_pairs.question: What topic was presented at the CANHEIT 2019 conference on June 20, 2019, concerning Canada's National Advanced Computing Centers?
qa_pairs.answer: On June 20, 2019, the CANHEIT 2019 conference featured a presentation titled 'Providing A Unified User Environment for Canada’s National Advanced Computing Centers'.

qa_pairs.question: Which publication from July 28, 2019, discussed providing a unified software environment for Canada’s National Advanced Computing Centers, and where can its PDF be accessed?
qa_pairs.answer: The paper 'Providing a Unified Software Environment for Canada’s National Advanced Computing Centers' was published on July 28, 2019, in the Proceedings of the Practice and Experience in Advanced Research Computing '19. A PDF of this paper is available at https://ssl.linklings.net/conferences/pearc/pearc19_program/views/includes/files/pap139s3-file1.pdf.
